substep.title: Create/Append to Research File

check.action:
Create the research file at {{bundle_dir}}/research-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}-impl.md with frontmatter: kind: research status: active parent: [[{{ticket_alias}}]] aliases: [research-{{date}}-{{ticket_slug}}-impl] (plus standard thoughts-metadata fields) Initial body: "# Research

_Findings from R-phase of code-grill turns._

"
The context-md-format skill handles lazy-create and inline update. Pass the term list + repo root path.

substep.title: Scaffold Decision Record (if DR candidate + user-approved)

check.ask:
Hard-to-reverse decision surfaced this turn matching the three-condition gate: - Title: {{dr_candidate.title}} - Hard to reverse: yes - Surprising without context: yes - Real trade-off: yes ({{considered_options summary}})
Record as DR? - Yes (Recommended): scaffold the DR file now - No: capture in turn notes only; do not create separate artifact

check.action: Parse the returned DR path + DR-NNN. Write DR body using the format from decision-record-format skill. Edit ticket frontmatter children to add the DR alias.
Halt. Surface the validation error. Inspect frontmatter manually.
